text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 26 

DED_COPAY 

LABEL: Part D Deductible Co-pay Amount 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the dollar amount of Part D beneficiary co-payment charged by enhanced alternative 
plans that offer cost sharing during the deductible phase. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: DED_COPAY 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS Files) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This variable was new in 2010. 

The CCW
